heading: Tasks of Commission
label: 70703 Tasks of Commission

amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)70703.42 U.S.C. 16843, , .Pub. L. 109–155, title VIII, § 823119 Stat. 2941Dec. 30, 2005

children.heading: .—Cause
children.label: 2 .—Cause
children.text: Determine the cause of the incident.

children.heading: .—Contributing factors
children.label: 3 .—Contributing factors
children.text: Identify all contributing factors to the cause of the incident.

children.heading: .—Additional findings or recommendations
children.label: 5 .—Additional findings or recommendations
children.text: Provide any additional findings or recommendations deemed by the Commission to be important, whether or not they are related to the specific incident under investigation.

children.heading: .—Report
children.label: 6 .—Report
children.text: Prepare a report to Congress, the President, and the public.
